infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Fitbull reads your workouts from other apps and devices, plus your sleep, heart rate, heart-rate variability, steps, weight, height, and body-fat percentage from Apple Health to show a unified training timeline and personalize your coaching. We never read cycle-tracking or clinical data.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Fitbull writes your completed strength workouts and estimated active energy to Apple Health so they count toward your Fitness rings.

plugins.photosPermission: Fitbull uses your photo library so you can log meals from photos of your food.
plugins.cameraPermission: Fitbull uses the camera to photograph meals and scan food barcodes for logging.
Fitbull uses the camera to photograph meals and scan food barcodes for logging.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Fitbull reads your workouts from other apps and devices, plus your sleep, heart rate, heart-rate variability, steps, weight, height, and body-fat percentage from Apple Health to show a unified training timeline and personalize your coaching. We never read cycle-tracking or clinical data.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Fitbull writes your completed strength workouts and estimated active energy to Apple Health so they count toward your Fitness rings.

plugins.microphonePermission: Fitbull uses the microphone so you can dictate messages to your AI coach instead of typing.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Fitbull uses speech recognition to turn your dictated messages into text for the AI coach.
